product_overview: ComuGest IA is a multi-tenant SaaS dashboard for community management (incidencias, avisos, reservas) with an integrated 'Secretario IA' for FAQ, text generation and summaries. The app uses Next.js frontend routes, Supabase backend and OpenRouter for AI features (see PRD pages 1-5 for details).
core_goals: Allow neighbors to report and track incidents with optional AI classification and summaries.
Provide admins/presidents tools to create and publish notices, manage incidents and reservations.
Enable booking of community spaces with backend validation to avoid conflicts.
Offer an AI assistant ('Secretario IA') for answering FAQs, generating formal notices and summarizing long texts.
Support multi-tenant communities with role-based access and plan-based feature gating (basic vs pro).

features.name: User Authentication & Onboarding
features.description: Sign up and login using email (magic link or credentials) and associate users with a community via a community code. Onboarding allows admins to create a community and generate a join code (see PRD pages 6 and 13).
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email field -> Fill community code field -> Click Register button -> Receive magic link email -> Click magic link -> Land on /home -> See welcome message and community name
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Click Login button -> See magic link sent confirmation -> If user clicks magic link, land on /home
Navigate to /register -> Fill email field with already used email -> Click Register button -> See error message 'Email already registered' or 'Account exists'
Navigate to /login -> Leave community code blank -> Click Login button -> See validation error 'Community code required' or 'Invalid community code'

features.name: Home Dashboard (Neighbor)
features.description: Simple dashboard showing welcome, last notices, recent incidents, quick actions (New incident, Reserve space) and a floating button to open the Secretario IA chat (see PRD page 9).
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> See welcome message 'Hola, [Nombre]' -> See 'Últimos avisos' list (2-3 items) -> See 'Incidencias recientes' list -> Click 'Nueva incidencia' button -> Navigate to /incidents/new
Navigate to /home -> No notices present -> See empty state 'No hay avisos' card with CTA to check later

features.name: Incident Reporting (Neighbor)
features.description: Create new incidents with title, description and attachments. Backend calls AI to classify category and priority and generate a short confirmation/summary (AI behavior described on PRD pages 1-4 and 16).
user_flows: Navigate to /incidents/new -> Fill incident title field -> Fill incident description field -> Attach photo (optional) -> Click submit button -> Backend calls AI to classify category and priority -> See confirmation message and redirect to /incidents
Navigate to /incidents/new -> Leave title blank -> Fill description -> Click submit button -> See validation error 'Title is required' and remain on /incidents/new

features.name: Incident List & Detail (Neighbor & Admin)
features.description: List incidents (user's incidents or community-wide for admin) with filters by status and category. View incident detail with attachments, timeline of comments and status changes (PRD pages 1 and 10).
user_flows: Navigate to /incidents -> See list of incidents with badges for priority and status -> Use filter dropdown to select 'Abierta' -> Click an incident card -> See incident detail with title, description, attachments and comment timeline
Navigate to /incidents -> Click incident -> In detail, add comment in comment box -> Click send -> See new comment appended to timeline
Navigate to /incidents -> Attempt to upload attachment larger than limit -> Click upload -> See error 'File too large' and attachment not saved

features.name: Notices / Comunicados
features.description: Admins write a short draft and can ask the Secretario IA to generate a formal full notice and a short version for WhatsApp/email. Neighbors view active notices ordered by date (PRD pages 4 and 11).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click 'Nuevo aviso' -> Fill title field -> Fill draft textarea -> Click 'Pedir ayuda al Secretario IA' -> System sends draft to AI -> Receive generated 'body' and 'short_body' -> Admin reviews and clicks Publish -> Notice appears in /notices
Navigate to /notices -> See list of active notices -> Click a notice -> See detail card with title, full body, start and end dates
Navigate to /admin -> Click 'Nuevo aviso' -> Leave title and draft empty -> Click Publish -> See validation error 'Title and draft required'

features.name: Space Reservations
features.description: Neighbors can view community spaces, see a simple calendar of slots per space and create reservations. Backend enforces no-overlap and plan limits (see PRD pages 4, 5 and 16).
user_flows: Navigate to /reservations -> Select a space card -> View weekly calendar with free and occupied slots -> Select date and time slot -> Fill notes (optional) -> Click book -> Backend validates no overlap -> See reservation confirmation and reminder scheduled
Navigate to /reservations -> Select a slot that is already taken -> Click book -> See conflict error 'Slot already booked' and option to choose another time

features.name: AI Assistant - 'Secretario IA' (Chat & Utilities)
features.description: Chat-style assistant accessible from /assistant that uses OpenRouter. For each query the backend collects community norms and recent notices, builds a system prompt and calls OpenRouter; optionally stores ai_sessions (PRD pages 4-5 and 16-17). Also supports generation endpoints for notices and summaries.
user_flows: Navigate to /assistant -> Type question '¿Cuándo se limpia el garaje?' -> Click Send -> Backend fetches faqs/docs and recent notices -> Backend calls OpenRouter -> See assistant response in chat window
Navigate to /assistant -> Type long meeting minutes -> Click 'Summarize' action -> Backend calls OpenRouter via /api/ai/summarize-doc -> See bulleted summary returned and option to save
Navigate to /assistant -> Type question -> Click Send -> Backend missing OPENROUTER_API_KEY -> See error 'AI service unavailable' with fallback message 'Puedes consultar las normas en Ajustes'

features.name: Admin Panel - Incident & Reservation Management
features.description: Admin dashboard at /admin with full incidents table, controls to change status, assign providers, add internal notes, and manage reservations and notices. Filters by community, state, category and priority (PRD pages 6 and 11).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open 'Panel de incidencias' -> Use filters to find open incidents -> Click an incident row -> In detail panel change status to 'En curso' -> Add internal note -> Click Save -> See status updated in list
Navigate to /admin -> Open 'Gestión de reservas' -> Click a reservation -> Click 'Cancelar reserva' -> See confirm modal -> Confirm cancellation -> See reservation status 'cancelled'
Navigate to /admin -> Try to change incident outside your community -> Click change status -> See error 'Forbidden' or 'Access denied'

features.name: Community Settings & Roles
features.description: Admins create and configure communities, manage users and roles, edit norms/docs that the AI will use as context. Onboarding includes generating a unique community code for neighbors to join (PRD pages 6 and 14).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open 'Ajustes de comunidad' -> Click 'Crear comunidad' -> Fill name and address -> Click Create -> System generates community code -> See community listed with plan 'trial' or default plan
Navigate to /admin -> Open 'Usuarios y roles' -> Click 'Invitar vecino' -> Fill email and unit -> Click Send Invite -> See pending invitation in list
Navigate to /admin -> Create community with duplicate code -> Click Create -> See validation error 'Community code already exists'

features.name: Plans & Feature Gating (Basic vs Pro)
features.description: Feature flags based on communities.plan and subscription_status fields. Basic: incidents + notices. Pro: adds reservations and full AI features. Stripe integration is planned but not required for MVP (PRD pages 7 and 18).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Open 'Plan y facturación' -> Set plan to 'pro' in UI -> Click Save -> See message 'Pro features enabled' -> On /reservations and /assistant features become available
Navigate to /reservations as a neighbor in a 'basic' community -> Click 'Reservar' -> See notice 'Feature not available on your plan. Upgrade required.'

features.name: Incident Reporting
features.description: Create and track community incidents with AI assistance
